creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Further (after the chmod action)
==>   QLightDM/greeter.h: 2: Syntax error: "(" unexpected
gmake[4]: *** [Makefile:1020: greeter_moc5.cpp] Error 2
gmake[4]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
QLightDM/power.h: /CHANGES.txt: Permission denied
==> QLightDM/power.h: 2: Syntax error: "(" unexpected

So I think it is either an encoding error or it does not recognize the header-filea in this directory (liblightdm-qt/QLightDM).
